title: Uniface Web Application
text: Uniface Web Application A Uniface Web application is a typical example of network deployment. A web application must be deployed on servers. Clients access the application from a browser via the internet. Figure 1. Uniface Web Application Table 1. Related learning videos Title link Web Application Middleware Chain Related Links Uniface Web Applications Uniface web applications run in a Uniface Web Application Server and are invoked by the client browser over the internet.
